pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK requirement.
Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4.6, which requires Java 17+ and aligns with the JDK 21 migration.
Upgrade Spring Framework to version 6.2.8 to match the new Spring Boot version.
Upgrade Spring Data BOM to version 2024.1.7 to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.4.
Rename the project artifact ID from association-app-backend to ucronia-app-backend.
Update project name, description, and URLs to reflect the new project identity.
Update SCM, issue management, and CI management URLs to point to the new repository.
Update distribution management repository URLs to the new GitHub Packages path.
Update the manifest name property to match the new artifact ID.
Upgrade the parent POM version from 1.5.3 to 1.5.10.
Add the custom framework validation dependency.
Add the custom framework Spring WS starter dependency.
Add the custom framework Spring WS security starter dependency.
Add the custom framework architecture tests dependency.
Add/Update Apache POI version to 5.3.0.
Add/Update ArchUnit version to 1.3.0.
Add/Update AssertJ version to 3.27.3.
Add/Update Commons Codec version to 1.17.0.
Add/Update Jakarta Validation version to 3.1.1.
Add/Update SLF4J version to 2.0.17.
Update Maven site skin version to 2.4.1.
Remove the exclusion of logback from spring-boot-starter-validation, likely due to dependency management changes.

.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Expand CI testing to run against multiple JDK versions (17 and 20) using a matrix strategy.
Replace reusable workflow call with explicit inline steps for checkout, JDK setup, and Maven execution.
.github/workflows/test.yml.human_impl:
steps:
- name: Check-out
  uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up JDK
  uses: actions/setup-java@v4
- name: Run up to integration tests
  run: mvn verify -fae

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .env file to .gitignore to prevent committing environment variables.

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the build stage base image from Maven with JDK 11 to Maven with Eclipse Temurin JDK 22 to support the target Java version.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: FROM maven:3.8.2-jdk-11-slim as build -> FROM maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-22-alpine as build

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the deployment stage base image from OpenJDK 14 to Eclipse Temurin JRE 22 to match the target Java version.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: FROM openjdk:14-alpine as deployment -> FROM eclipse-temurin:22-jre-alpine as deployment

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Bump the Maven version in the build image from 3.8.2 to 3.9.9.
Change the working directory in the build stage from /usr/src/app to /app for consistency.
Replace mvn dependency:resolve with mvn dependency:go-offline for more robust dependency caching.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN mvn dependency:resolve -> RUN mvn dependency:go-offline

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Copy only source files instead of the entire context to improve Docker layer caching efficiency.
Add --batch-mode flag to Maven build command to ensure non-interactive execution.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN mvn clean package -> RUN mvn --batch-mode clean package

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace curl with wget in the health check command, as curl is not available in the new Alpine-based image.
Create a dedicated non-root user 'runner' for security best practices in the container.
docker/Dockerfile.human_impl: RUN addgroup -S runners && adduser --disabled-password -S runner -G runners

docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Create a logs directory and expose it as a volume, assigning ownership to the runner user.
Switch the container execution context to the non-root runner user.
Update the COPY command path to reflect the new working directory structure.
Change the CMD instruction to JSON exec form to avoid shell wrapper and ensure proper signal handling.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Integrate Prometheus, Loki, Promtail, and Grafana services into the Docker Compose configuration for application observability.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added service definitions for prom/prometheus, grafana/promtail, grafana/loki, and grafana/grafana with associated volumes and network connections.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Replace legacy 'links' with explicit Docker networks to segment database, application, and monitoring traffic.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Defined 'app', 'db', and 'monitoring' networks and assigned services to appropriate networks, removing the deprecated 'links' property.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Restrict service port exposure to localhost only to improve local development security.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Changed port mappings from '5432:5432' to '127.0.0.1:5432:5432' for database and backend services.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Move environment variables to an external .env file to simplify configuration management.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'env_file: .env' to the backend service and removed hardcoded sensitive variables like JWT secrets from the compose file.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Mount a SQL script to initialize database schemas automatically upon container startup.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added volume mapping './sql/create_schemas.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/create_schemas.sql' to the database service.

docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Persist application logs to a named volume for consumption by the logging stack.
docker/docker-compose.yml.human_impl: Added 'association-logs' volume and mapped it to '/app/logs' in the backend and '/logs' in Promtail.

readme.md.general_idea: Rename the project from 'Association App' to 'Ucronia App' to reflect the new association name.
readme.md.human_impl: Changed title to '# Ucronia App Backend' and description to 'Backend app for the Ucronía association'.

readme.md.general_idea: Update GitHub and documentation links to point to the new repository name 'ucronia-app-backend'.
readme.md.human_impl: Updated [issues], [scm] links to use 'ucronia-app-backend' and removed old javadoc/site links.

readme.md.general_idea: Update the Docker Compose project name to match the new application name.
readme.md.human_impl: Changed docker-compose command to use '--project-name ucronia-backend'.

readme.md.general_idea: Correct the local development URL to point to the root path instead of a specific entity endpoint.
Document the inclusion of Grafana for monitoring in the Docker development environment.
readme.md.human_impl: Added a 'Monitoring' section listing Grafana at http://localhost:3000.

readme.md.general_idea: Remove outdated or redundant documentation sections regarding release/develop doc generation and badges.
readme.md.human_impl: Removed badges, detailed release/develop doc links, and simplified the 'Building the docs' section.

src/changes/changes.xml.general_idea: Replace the placeholder changelog with a comprehensive history of releases from v0.1.0 to v0.5.7.
src/changes/changes.xml.human_impl: Replaced the single '1.0.0' release entry with a detailed list of releases including version numbers, dates, and action items.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Reorganize Liquibase changelog includes to group by domain (General, Association, Inventory, Security) and update file references.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Replaced includes for member.yaml, balance.yaml, etc. with configuration.yaml, association.yaml, funds.yaml, people.yaml, inventory.yaml, library.yaml, and auth.yaml.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Move authentication initial data setup from inline SQL files to a classpath-based changelog and a new structure file.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Removed inline changeSets for permissions.sql, root_user.sql, and sequences.sql; added includes for classpath:db/changelog/auth/initialize.yaml and structure/auth.yaml.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Remove explicit sequence initialization SQL file from the master changelog.

src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.general_idea: Enhance console logging output with color highlighting and improved formatting for better readability.
src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.human_impl: Changed PatternLayout to include %highlight and %style directives.

src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.general_idea: Replace simple file logging with a rolling file appender to manage log file size and retention automatically.
src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.human_impl: Replaced <File> appender with <RollingFile> including SizeBasedTriggeringPolicy and TimeBasedTriggeringPolicy.

src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.general_idea: Activate file logging for the application logger to persist debug logs to disk.
src/main/resources/log4j2.xml.human_impl: Added <AppenderRef ref="file" /> to the com.bernardomg logger.

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL fixture to align with the reworked fee model that links fees to transactions.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.human_impl: Replaced INSERT into 'fees' with INSERTs into 'association.transactions' and 'association.fees' including new columns like 'transaction_id'.

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.general_idea: Update test SQL fixture to align with the reworked fee model that links fees to transactions.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/full_y.human_impl: Replaced INSERT into 'fees' with INSERTs into 'association.transactions' and 'association.fees' including transaction_id.

src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.general_idea: Update test SQL data to reflect the new fee model that links fees to transactions and uses person_id instead of member_id.
src/test/resources/db/queries/fee/multip.human_impl: Replaced INSERT into fees with INSERT into association.transactions and association.fees, adding transaction_id and changing member_id to person_id.
